bug_report.summary: Passwords entry details show inconsistent IDN formatting (Unicode title/list vs punycode Website address)
steps_to_reproduce: Add a new password with Website/Origin `https://bücher.de` and save it.
Open the saved entry details view.
expected_behaviors: The domain/origin should be displayed consistently across the entry header, list item, and Website address field (either consistently Unicode or consistently punycode, per product decision).
actual_behaviors: After change: entry header and left-side list show `bücher.de`, but the Website address field displays `https://xn--bcher-kva.de` (punycode), creating inconsistent/possibly confusing presentation.
